            function Hop()
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 296
              local r3_296 = os.date("!*t")
              local r5_296 = function()
                -- line: [0, 0] id: 299
                if upval_0 ~= "" then
                  local r1_299 = game.HttpService:JSONDecode(game.HttpService)
                end
                r1_299 = game.HttpService:JSONDecode(game.HttpService)
                if not r1_299.nextPageCursor then
                  if r1_299.nextPageCursor ~= "null" then
                    if r1_299.nextPageCursor ~= "null" then
                      upval_0 = r1_299.nextPageCursor
                    end
                  end
                end
                local r3_299, r4_299, r5_299 = pairs(r1_299.data)
                local r9_299 = tostring("/servers/Public?sortOrder=Asc&limit=100".id)
                r9_299 = tonumber("/servers/Public?sortOrder=Asc&limit=100".maxPlayers)
                local r10_299 = tonumber("/servers/Public?sortOrder=Asc&limit=100".playing)
                if r10_299 < r9_299 then
                  local r9_299, r10_299, r11_299 = pairs(upval_2)
                  if 0 ~= 0 then
                    local r14_299 = tostring(r13_299)
                    if r9_299 == r14_299 then

            function UpdateBerriesESP()
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 402

                return

            function BringMob(r0_407)
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 407

                      if 0 < r5_407.Humanoid.Health then
                        if r5_407.HumanoidRootPart.Position - plr.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Magnitude <= 350 then
                          r5_407.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = BringPos
                          r5_407.Humanoid.JumpPower = 0
                          r5_407.Humanoid.WalkSpeed = 0

              end
              for r4_407, r5_407 in r1_407 do
                return
            end

            function CheckNearestTeleporter(r0_98)
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 98

                if game.PlaceId ~= 4442272183 then
                  if game.PlaceId == 7449423635 then

                    r7_98 = Vector3.new(5657.8862304688, 1013.0790405273, -335.49963378906)

                    r7_98 = Vector3.new(-5036, 315, -3179)

                    r7_98 = Vector3.new(28286, 14897, 103)
                  end
                  r7_98 = Vector3.new(-390, 332, 673)
                  r7_98 = Vector3.new(2285, 15, 905)
                  r7_98 = Vector3.new(923, 126, 32852)
                  r7_98 = Vector3.new(-6509, 83, -133)
                end
                r7_98 = Vector3.new(-7894, 5547, -380)
                r7_98 = Vector3.new(-4607, 874, -1667)
                r7_98 = Vector3.new(61163, 11, 1819)
                r7_98 = Vector3.new(61165.19140625, 0.18704631924629, 1897.3791503906)
                r7_98 = Vector3.new(-1242.4625244141, 4.7870597839355, 3901.2829589844)
                r7_98 = Vector3.new(4050, -1, -1814)
              end
              local r6_98, r7_98, r8_98 = pairs(r6_98)
              if -1814 - r0_98.Position.Magnitude < math.huge then
              end
              for r9_98, r10_98 in r6_98 do
                if -1814 - r0_98.Position.Magnitude <= r0_98.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Magnitude then
                  return -1814
                end
                return
            end

            local r10_1 = function(r0_528)
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 528
              if not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character then
                if 0 < game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Health then
                  local r2_528 = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                  if not r2_528 then
                    if r0_528 then
                      return
                    end

                    if not r3_528 then
                      requestEntrance(r3_528)
                    end
                    local r4_528 = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("PartTele")
                    if r4_528 then
                      r4_528 = Instance.new("Part", game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character)
                      local r5_528 = Vector3.new(10, 1, 10)
                      r4_528.Size = r5_528
                      r4_528.Name = "PartTele"
                      r4_528.Anchored = true
                      r4_528.Transparency = 1
                      r4_528.CanCollide = true
                      r5_528 = WaitHRP(game.Players.LocalPlayer)
                      r4_528.CFrame = r5_528.CFrame
                      local r6_528 = r4_528:GetPropertyChangedSignal("CFrame")

                        -- line: [0, 0] id: 529

                          return
                        end

                            r0_529 = WaitHRP(upval_1)

                          end
                        end

            function BTP(r0_377)
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 377
              local r2_377 = function()
                -- line: [0, 0] id: 378
                if 1500 <= upval_0.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Magnitude then
                  if Auto_Raid then
                    if 0 < game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Health then
                    end
                  end
                  wait()
                  game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = upval_0
                  wait(0.05)
                  game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Head:Destroy()
                  game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = upval_0
                  if upval_0.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Magnitude < 1500 then
                    if 0 < game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid.Health then
                    end
                  end
                end
                return
              end
              pcall(r2_377)
              return
            end

            function TPP(r0_551)
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 551
              local r1_551 = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
              if 0 < r1_551.Health then
                r1_551 = game:GetService("Players")
                r1_551 = r1_551.LocalPlayer.Character:WaitForChild("Humanoid")
                if not r1_551 then
                  r1_551 = game:service("TweenService")
                  local r3_551 = game:GetService("Players")
                  local r2_551 = TweenInfo.new(r3_551.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - r0_551.Position.Magnitude / 325, Enum.EasingStyle.Linear)
                  r3_551 = r1_551:Create(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart, r2_551, {CFrame = r0_551})
                  tween = r3_551
                  tween:Play()
                  local r4_551 = function(r0_552)
                    -- line: [0, 0] id: 552
                    tween:Cancel()
                    return
                  end
                  return r3_551
                end
              end
              tween:Cancel()
            end
          end
          wait()
          r1_551 = game:GetService({Stop = r4_551})

            function CheckRace()
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 251
              local r0_251 = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
              r0_251 = r0_251.Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer("Wenlocktoad", "1")
              local r1_251 = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
              r1_251 = r1_251.Remotes.CommF_:InvokeServer("Alchemist", "1")
              local r2_251 = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("RaceTransformed")
              if r2_251 then
                if r0_251 == -2 then
                  r2_251 = game:GetService("Players")
                  return r2_251.LocalPlayer.Data.Race.Value .. " V3"
                end
                if r1_251 == -2 then
                  r2_251 = game:GetService("Players")
                  return r2_251.LocalPlayer.Data.Race.Value .. " V2"
                end
                r2_251 = game:GetService("Players")
                return r2_251.LocalPlayer.Data.Race.Value .. " V1"
              end
              r2_251 = game:GetService("Players")
              return r2_251.LocalPlayer.Data.Race.Value .. " V4"
            end

            function targettrial()
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 521
              if _G.TargTrial == "TargTrial" then
                local r2_521, r3_521, r4_521 = pairs(game.Players:GetChildren())
                c = r6_521.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position - game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Magnitude
                if c <= 450 then
                  if r6_521 ~= game.Players.LocalPlayer then
                  end
                end
                for r5_521, r6_521 in r2_521 do
                  if r6_521 == "c" then
                    return
                  end
                  if _G.TargTrial == "c" then
                    _G.TargTrial = r6_521
                    return
                  end
                  return
                end
                return
            end

            function CheckQuestNew()
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 209
              if 2600 <= game.Players.LocalPlayer.Data.Level.Value then
                if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Data.Level.Value <= 2624 then
                  MonNew = "Reef Bandit"
                  LevelQuestNew = 1
                  NameQuestNew = "SubmergedQuest1"
                  NameMonNew = "Reef Bandit"
                  local r1_209 = CFrame.new(10882.264, -2086.322, 10034.226)
                  CFrameQuestNew = r1_209
                  r1_209 = CFrame.new(10736.6191, -2087.8439, 9338.4882)
                  CFrameMonNew = r1_209
                end
              end
              if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Data.Level.Value >= 2625 then
                if 2649 < game.Players.LocalPlayer.Data.Level.Value then
                end
                if 2650 <= game.Players.LocalPlayer.Data.Level.Value then
                  if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Data.Level.Value <= 2674 then
                    MonNew = "Sea Chanter"
                    LevelQuestNew = 1
                    NameQuestNew = "SubmergedQuest2"
                    NameMonNew = "Sea Chanter"
                    r1_209 = CFrame.new(10882.264, -2086.322, 10034.226)
                    CFrameQuestNew = r1_209
                    r1_209 = CFrame.new(10621.0342, -2087.844, 10102.0332)
                    CFrameMonNew = r1_209
                  end
                end
                if 2675 <= game.Players.LocalPlayer.Data.Level.Value then
                  if game.Players.LocalPlayer.Data.Level.Value <= 2750 then
                    MonNew = "Ocean Prophet"
                    LevelQuestNew = 2
                    NameQuestNew = "SubmergedQuest2"
                    NameMonNew = "Ocean Prophet"
                    r1_209 = CFrame.new(10882.264, -2086.322, 10034.226)
                    CFrameQuestNew = r1_209
                    r1_209 = CFrame.new(11056.1445, -2001.6717, 10117.4493)
                    CFrameMonNew = r1_209
                  end
                  MonNew = "Coral Pirate"
                  LevelQuestNew = 2

            function TweenToPosition(r0_226)
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 226
              if not game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character then
                local r2_226 = game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
              end
              if r2_226 then
                return
              end
              local r3_226 = game:GetService("TweenService")
              local r8_226 = r3_226:Create(Enum.EasingStyle.Linear)
              local r5_226 = r3_226:Create(r3_226, r2_226, r8_226, {CFrame = r0_226})
              r5_226:Play()
              r5_226.Completed:Wait()
              return
            end
            function Skill(r0_355)
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 355
              local r1_355 = game:GetService("VirtualInputManager")
              r1_355:SendKeyEvent(true, Enum.KeyCode[r0_355], false, game)
              task.wait(0.05)
              r1_355:SendKeyEvent(false, Enum.KeyCode[r0_355], false, game)
              return
            end
            function Click()
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 565
              local r0_565 = game:GetService("VirtualInputManager")
              r0_565:SendMouseButtonEvent(0, 0, 0, true, game, 1)
              task.wait(0.05)
              r0_565:SendMouseButtonEvent(0, 0, 0, false, game, 1)
              return
            end
            function FindWeapon(r0_246)
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 246
              local r2_246, r3_246, r4_246 = ipairs(game.Players.LocalPlayer.Backpack:GetChildren())
              local r7_246 = r6_246:IsA("Tool")
              if not r7_246 then
                if r0_246 == "Melee" then
                  if r6_246.ToolTip ~= "Melee" then
                    if r6_246.Name ~= "Combat" then
                    end
                    if r0_246 == "Sword" then
                      if r6_246.ToolTip ~= "Sword" then
                      end
                      if r0_246 == "Gun" then
                        if r6_246.ToolTip == "Gun" then
                          return r6_246.Name
                        end
                      end
                      if r0_246 == "Fruit" then
                        if r6_246.ToolTip == "Blox Fruit" then
                          return r6_246.Name
                        end
                        return r6_246.Name
                      end
                    end
                    return r6_246.Name
                  end
                end
              end
              for r5_246, r6_246 in r2_246 do
                return nil
            end
            function EquipWeapon(r0_7)
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 7
              if r0_7 then
                return
              end
              local r2_7 = game.Players.LocalPlayer:WaitForChild("Backpack")
              r2_7 = r2_7:FindFirstChild(r0_7)
              if not r2_7 then
                game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character.Humanoid:EquipTool(r2_7)
              end
              return
            end
            function AttackAllSkills()
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 522
              local r0_522 = FindWeapon("Melee")
              local r1_522 = FindWeapon("Sword")
              local r2_522 = FindWeapon("Fruit")
              local r3_522 = FindWeapon("Gun")
              if not r0_522 then
                EquipWeapon(r0_522)
                Skill("Z")
                Skill("X")
                Skill("C")
                Skill("V")
                Click()
              end
              if not r1_522 then
                EquipWeapon(r1_522)
                Skill("Z")
                Skill("X")
                Click()
              end
              if not r2_522 then
                EquipWeapon(r2_522)
                Skill("Z")
                Skill("X")
                Skill("C")
                Skill("F")
                Click()
              end
              if not r3_522 then
                EquipWeapon(r3_522)
                Skill("Z")
                Skill("X")
                Click()
              end
              return
            end

          end

              if not r10_92 then

                  if not r8_92 then
                    r9_92 = r8_92:IsA("BasePart")

                      task.wait(0.3)

                      task.wait(0.1)
                      r9_92:SendKeyEvent(false, Enum.KeyCode.E, false, game)
                    end
                  end
                  if not _G.CollectBerryHop then
                    Hop()
                  end
                  return
            end

                              r6_174 = game:GetService("Players")
                              sethiddenproperty(r6_174.LocalPlayer, "SimulationRadius", math.huge)
                              if _G.ThirdSea ~= false then
                                if 473.18951416016.Humanoid.Health > 0 then
                                  if 473.18951416016.Parent then
                                  end
                                end
                              end
                              for r3_174, r4_174 in r0_174 do
                              end
                            end
                          end
                        end
                      end
                      return
                  end
                  pcall(r1_173)
                end
                return

            function checkQuesta()
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 243
              local r3_243 = function()
                -- line: [0, 0] id: 245
                local r1_245 = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
                r1_245.Modules.Net["RF/DragonHunter"]:InvokeServer(r1_245.Modules.Net["RF/DragonHunter"])
                return
              end
              pcall(r3_243)
              local r3_243 = function()
                -- line: [0, 0] id: 244
                local r0_244 = game:GetService("ReplicatedStorage")
                r0_244 = r0_244.Modules.Net["RF/DragonHunter"]:InvokeServer(r0_244.Modules.Net["RF/DragonHunter"])
                upval_0 = r0_244
                return
              end
              local r2_243, r3_243 = pcall(r3_243)
              if not nil then
                if not nil.Text then
                  local r9_243 = string.find(nil.Text, "Defeat")
                  if not r9_243 then
                    r9_243 = tonumber(string.sub(nil.Text, 8, 9))
                    local r9_243, r10_243, r11_243 = pairs({"Hydra Enforcer", "Venomous Assailant"})
                    local r14_243 = string.find(nil.Text, 9)
                    if not r14_243 then
                    end
                    for r12_243, r13_243 in r9_243 do
                    end
                    r9_243 = string.find(nil.Text, "Destroy")
                    if not r9_243 then
                    end
                  end
                end
                return true, 9, 10, 2
            end
            function BackTODoJo()
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 69

                local r5_69 = string.find(r4_69.Text, "Head back to the Dojo to complete more tasks")
                if not r5_69 then
                  return true
                end
              end
              for r3_69, r4_69 in r0_69 do
                return false
            end
            function DragonMobClear(r0_312, r1_312, r2_312)
              -- line: [0, 0] id: 312
              local r3_312 = workspace.Enemies:FindFirstChild(r1_312)
              if r3_312 then
                if not r2_312 then
                  topos(r2_312)

                  local r8_312 = Attack.Alive(r7_312)
                  if not r8_312 then
                    if not r0_312 then
                      Attack.Kill(r7_312, r0_312)
                    end
                  end
                end
                for r6_312, r7_312 in r3_312 do
                end
                return
            end

                        end
                        if r4_186.Name == Mon then
                          local r5_186 = r4_186:FindFirstChild("Humanoid")
                          if not r5_186 then
                            r5_186 = r4_186:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart")
                            if not r5_186 then
                              if 0 < r4_186.Humanoid.Health then
                                local r6_186 = game:GetService("Players")
                                if r4_186.HumanoidRootPart.Position - r6_186.LocalPlayer.Character.HumanoidRootPart.Position.Magnitude <= 320 then
                                end

                                  if r4_186.HumanoidRootPart.Position - PosMon.Position.Magnitude <= 250 then
                                    r4_186.Head.CanCollide = false
                                    r4_186.HumanoidRootPart.CanCollide = false
                                    r6_186 = Vector3.new(60, 60, 60)
                                    r4_186.HumanoidRootPart.Size = r6_186
                                    r4_186.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = PosMon
                                    r5_186 = r4_186.Humanoid:FindFirstChild("Animator")
                                    if not r5_186 then
                                      r4_186.Humanoid.Animator:Destroy()
                                    end
                                    r6_186 = game:GetService("Players")
                                    sethiddenproperty(r6_186.LocalPlayer, "SimulationRadius", math.huge)
                                  end
                                  if r4_186.Name ~= MonFarm then
                                    if r4_186.Name == Mon then
                                    end
                                    if r4_186.HumanoidRootPart.Position - PosMon.Position.Magnitude <= 320 then
                                      r6_186 = Vector3.new(60, 60, 60)
                                      r4_186.HumanoidRootPart.Size = r6_186
                                      r4_186.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = PosMon
                                      r4_186.HumanoidRootPart.CanCollide = false
                                      r4_186.Head.CanCollide = false
                                      r5_186 = r4_186.Humanoid:FindFirstChild("Animator")
                                      if not r5_186 then
                                        r4_186.Humanoid.Animator:Destroy()
                                      end
                                      sethiddenproperty(game.Players.LocalPlayer, "SimulationRadius", math.huge)
                                    end
                                  end
                                end
                              end
                            end
                          end
                        end
                      end
                    end
                    for r3_186, r4_186 in r0_186 do
                      return
                  end
                  pcall(r1_185)
                end
                return
              end
